title: How to Sell AI Workflows (Without Starting an Agency)

extracted.hook: So today I'm going to teach you guys how to sell AI workflows without starting an agency.
transitions: In this video, I'm going to break down why starting an agency is a trap, what to do instead, and how to sell your first AI workflows step by step.
The real issue with diving into an agency first is that you're trying to run before you've learned to walk.
extracted.cta: If this kind of stuff interests you and you're looking to connect with other people who are just as interested in it, then definitely check out my plus community. The link for that will also be in the description.
analogies: "Think of it like learning golf. When you first start, you're going to get blisters on your hands"
"A no-brainer to me sounds like this"
extracted.vulnerability: "I was wearing all the hats, scoping, sales, building, delivery"

accelerate: The goal here isn't to make millions overnight. It's to rack up three to five solid paid results that you can show as proof of what you can do.
slow: So the big question remaining is how do you actually sell your first AI workflows as a freelancer?

frameworks: Step one, choose a pain point to solve.
Step two is to build a simple demo or case study.
Step three is to outreach with a strong offer.
